conversations.content: Make a nice isolate tree suitable for mesh extraction in a top down orthographic view on a black background on a small green mound with an arcade aestetic. Clear readable silouette.

conversations.revisedPrompt: A single stylized tree in top-down orthographic view on a small green mound, black background, strong arcade aesthetic. Clear, readable silhouette with simple, clean shapes suitable for mesh extraction. Bright, saturated arcade colors with subtle pixel-art/retro feel, crisp edges, no clutter. High contrast between tree canopy and trunk, and between mound and background. Centered composition.
